playbook.intent: A 30-minute demo for 3-10 design partners runs cleanly; structured feedback is captured against 3 hypotheses; follow-ups are filed within 48 hours.
playbook.scope: A 30-minute demo for 3-10 design partners runs cleanly; structured feedback is captured against 3 hypotheses; follow-ups are filed within 48 hours.

success-criteria.criterion: Follow-ups filed and partners thanked within 48h

stage.name: Pick hypotheses
stage.intent: Walk in with 3 explicit hypotheses to test.

tasks.task: Write 3 sharp hypotheses the demo will pressure-test
Map each hypothesis to a moment in the demo flow
Define what 'confirm' and 'refute' look like for each

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each hypothesis has explicit confirm/refute signals.

stage.name: Recruit partners
stage.intent: Pick 3-10 partners that span the target use cases.

tasks.task: Invite design partners matching the target segments

stage.name: Run demo
stage.intent: Run the demo as a probe, not a pitch.

tasks.task: Demo the flow tied to the hypotheses, not the full product
Pause after each hypothesis-moment for reactions

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each hypothesis-moment has a clear partner reaction logged.

stage.name: Capture feedback

tasks.task: Mark each cell as confirm / refute / neutral

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every hypothesis has a row of partner reactions.

stage.name: File follow-ups
stage.intent: Convert reactions into product actions within 48 hours.

tasks.task: Decide per hypothesis: confirmed, refuted, iterate
Send partners a 'thanks + here's what we heard' note

stage.decision-gate: Required: every hypothesis exits with a confirmed/refuted/iterate verdict.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content customer-demo-sneak-peek-session --format md, agent: faion get-content customer-demo-sneak-peek-session --format context, json: faion get-content customer-demo-sneak-peek-session --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
